partial_progress.details: Phase 6a (iteration function) partially implemented. Basic strictDensityIterWithFuel structure in place but escape cases return none. Phase 6b (fuel_suffices proof) not started - this is the critical remaining work.

completion_data.completion_summary: Added fuel-based iteration infrastructure for strict density. 13 sorries remain in DensityFrameCondition.lean and 3 in CantorApplication.lean. Key mathematical analysis completed: all sorries are in reflexive cluster cases requiring well-founded iteration.
